items.title: France Design Impact Award 2026
items.title_zh: 法国国家工业产权局公布2026年设计影响力奖40强项目
items.title_en: INPI Reveals 40 Finalists for France Design Impact Award 2026
items.summary: France Design Impact Award 2026 sgurtler@inpi.fr 07 mai 2026 Les 40 projets du prix France Design Impact award 2026 ont été officiellement révélés lors de l’inauguration de la Foire économique de Tours le 2 mai. Cette sélection 2026 met en avant des initiatives venues de toutes les régions de France et démontre le rôle concret du design face aux grands enjeux climatiques et politiques. À travers différentes scènes de vie quotidienne (se soigner, habiter, se déplacer, s’instruire, communiquer, pr
items.ai_summary_zh: 法国国家工业产权局（INPI）于5月2日在图尔经济博览会开幕仪式上正式揭晓“2026法国设计影响力奖”的40个入围项目。该评选由经济、环境和社会三个专家陪审团共同评估，旨在展示设计在应对气候与政治挑战中的具体作用。INPI作为历史合作伙伴参与经济陪审团，强调设计作为经济转型战略杠杆的价值，涵盖产品、服务及品牌视觉等多个领域，凸显了外观设计在商业生态中的核心地位。
items.ai_summary_en: The French National Institute of Industrial Property (INPI) officially announced the 40 finalists for the 2026 France Design Impact Award during the inauguration of the Tours Economic Fair on May 2. The selection highlights initiatives from across all French regions, demonstrating design's concrete role in addressing major climatic and political challenges. Covering daily life scenarios such as healthcare, housing, mobility, education, communication, production, and communal living, the award underscores design as a strategic lever for economic transformation. The projects span product, industrial, brand, visual identity, user interface, spatial, and service design.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业应重视外观设计在欧盟市场的战略价值，不仅限于注册保护，更需结合ESG理念提升设计竞争力。建议关注INPI等机构的设计激励政策，通过高质量设计增强品牌溢价，并积极参与相关国际奖项以提升在欧洲市场的知名度与合规形象。
items.ai_insight_en: This initiative highlights the growing intersection between intellectual property strategy and sustainability metrics within the European design landscape. For rights holders, participation in or monitoring of such awards provides visibility into how national offices value non-traditional IP assets like service and interface design. It signals that commercial impact and ecological vision are increasingly central to official recognition frameworks.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["INPI揭晓2026年设计影响力奖40强，覆盖法国全境多元设计项目", "设立经济、环境、社会三重陪审团，评估设计的综合战略价值", "INPI深度参与评审，强化外观设计在工业产权与商业转化中的作用"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Forty diverse projects were selected to demonstrate design's strategic role in economic transformation and climate response.", "Three expert juries evaluated entries based on economic, environmental, and societal criteria reflecting the French design ecosystem.", "INPI participated in the economic jury alongside partners like Bpifrance, emphasizing design's value in industrial property."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["重视外观设计战略价值，结合ESG理念提升欧盟市场竞争力", "关注INPI设计激励政策，通过国际奖项提升品牌知名度与合规形象"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Recognize design's expanding role in economic and ESG strategies beyond traditional aesthetic protection.", "Practice note: Monitor INPI's engagement with multi-disciplinary design categories including service and UI/UX design.", "What to monitor: Trends in how national IP offices integrate environmental and societal impact into design evaluation."]
core_points_en: Forty diverse projects were selected to demonstrate design's strategic role in economic transformation and climate response.
Three expert juries evaluated entries based on economic, environmental, and societal criteria reflecting the French design ecosystem.
INPI participated in the economic jury alongside partners like Bpifrance, emphasizing design's value in industrial property.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Recognize design's expanding role in economic and ESG strategies beyond traditional aesthetic protection.
Practice note: Monitor INPI's engagement with multi-disciplinary design categories including service and UI/UX design.
What to monitor: Trends in how national IP offices integrate environmental and societal impact into design evaluation.

items.title: Tuesday at INTA: How AI is assisting judges | IP’s role in deals
items.title_zh: INTA焦点：AI如何辅助法官裁判及IP在交易中的角色
items.title_en: UK Judges Discuss AI Use in Judgments and IP Role in Corporate Deals at INTA
items.summary: Senior UK judges discussing the impact of AI on the judiciary, and the role of in-house IP lawyers during corporate transactions and carve-outs were among the top talking points
items.ai_summary_zh: 在INTA年会上，英格兰和威尔士高等法院及上诉法院法官讨论了AI在司法中的应用。上诉法院法官Colin Birss透露，他使用AI进行判决的逻辑一致性检查，以发现段落间的矛盾或需重写的部分，但明确反对用AI从头生成判决书。 panel还包括UKIPO指定人员Emma Himsworth。此外，会议还探讨了企业内部IP律师在公司剥离交易中的作用。这反映了英国司法界对AI工具持谨慎辅助态度，强调人类法官的最终责任。
items.ai_summary_en: Senior judges from the England and Wales High Court and Court of Appeal addressed the impact of artificial intelligence on the judiciary during a panel at the INTA Annual Meeting. Lord Justice Colin Birss, alongside Mr Justices Richard Meade and James Mellor, discussed practical applications of AI tools. Lord Justice Birss revealed he uses AI to sense-check judgments for inconsistencies, though he rejects using it to draft decisions from scratch. The session also covered the evolving role of in-house IP counsel in corporate transactions and carve-outs, moderated by Arty Rajendra of Osborne Clarke.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，英国后续是否会围绕这类规则动态给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: This development signals a cautious but growing integration of AI assistance within the English judiciary, specifically for quality control rather than decision-making. For rights holders and litigants, this suggests that judicial reasoning may become more internally consistent due to automated checks. It underscores the continued necessity for precise legal drafting and clear argumentation, as AI tools may highlight ambiguities that judges previously overlooked or resolved manually.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["英国法官利用AI进行判决逻辑一致性检查，辅助识别潜在矛盾", "法官明确拒绝使用AI从头生成判决书，坚持人类主导裁判", "会议同时探讨了内部IP律师在企业并购与资产剥离中的关键作用"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Lord Justice Birss uses AI to identify logical inconsistencies in drafted judgments but maintains human authorship.", "The panel included High Court justices and a UKIPO appointed person discussing judicial technology adoption.", "Discussions extended to the strategic importance of in-house IP lawyers during complex corporate deals."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["适应英国司法AI辅助趋势，强化法律文书逻辑严密性以应对智能审查", "重视IP在商业交易中的合规价值，借助专业力量规避法律风险"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Litigants should ensure legal submissions are logically coherent, as judges increasingly use AI to detect contradictions.", "Practice note: Monitor how UK courts define the boundaries of AI assistance to understand potential shifts in judgment clarity standards.", "What to monitor: Future guidance from the UK judiciary on acceptable AI tools and protocols for legal professionals interacting with the court."]
core_points_en: Lord Justice Birss uses AI to identify logical inconsistencies in drafted judgments but maintains human authorship.
The panel included High Court justices and a UKIPO appointed person discussing judicial technology adoption.
Discussions extended to the strategic importance of in-house IP lawyers during complex corporate deals.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Litigants should ensure legal submissions are logically coherent, as judges increasingly use AI to detect contradictions.
Practice note: Monitor how UK courts define the boundaries of AI assistance to understand potential shifts in judgment clarity standards.
What to monitor: Future guidance from the UK judiciary on acceptable AI tools and protocols for legal professionals interacting with the court.

items.title: World IP Day 2026: IP and Sports: Ready, Set, Innovate
items.title_zh: 2026年世界知识产权日：体育与IP协同创新
items.title_en: EPO Announces World IP Day 2026 Theme: IP and Sports Innovation
items.summary: EPO and national offices celebrate IP-driven innovation in sport
items.ai_summary_zh: 欧洲专利局（EPO）宣布2026年4月26日世界知识产权日主题为“IP与体育：准备、设定、创新”。该活动旨在强调知识产权在保护现代体育技术、设计及品牌中的关键作用，涵盖先进装备、性能提升技术及赛事转播等领域。EPO将与各国知识产权局合作开展社交媒体活动，通过#WorldIPDay标签分享全球激励运动员和连接粉丝的创新故事，展示IP对体育产业的支撑价值。
items.ai_summary_en: The European Patent Office (EPO) has announced that the global intellectual property community will celebrate World IP Day 2026 on 26 April under the theme 'IP and Sports: Ready, Set, Innovate'. This initiative highlights the critical role of IP rights in safeguarding the technologies, designs, and brands that define modern sports. The campaign emphasizes how IP protection supports advancements in athletic equipment, performance-enhancing technologies, and broadcast media. To mark the occasion, the EPO is collaborating with national IP offices to launch a coordinated social media campaign. Participants are encouraged to follow the conversation using the #WorldIPDay hashtag to discover stories illustrating how IP motivates athletes and connects fans worldwide.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类规则动态给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: This annual thematic focus provides context for understanding current policy priorities regarding innovation in specific sectors. For rights holders in the sports technology and apparel sectors, this alignment offers an opportunity to review portfolio visibility and brand positioning. The emphasis on digital engagement and storytelling suggests a continued trend towards public-facing IP education, which may influence how offices communicate the value of intangible assets to non-specialist audiences.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["EPO确立2026年世知日主题为体育领域的IP创新驱动发展", "强调IP在保护体育科技、设计及品牌资产中的核心法律地位", "联合各国局开展社媒宣传，展示IP如何赋能全球体育产业生态"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["World IP Day 2026 focuses on the intersection of intellectual property rights and the sports industry.", "The campaign highlights IP's role in protecting sports technology, design innovations, and broadcasting brands.", "The EPO collaborates with national offices on a social media campaign using the #WorldIPDay hashtag."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["提前布局运动科技专利，构建海外知识产权保护壁垒", "借势IP主题宣传，提升中国品牌在国际体育市场的合规形象"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Sports tech and apparel companies should leverage the heightened visibility to highlight their IP-driven innovations.", "Practice note: Monitor EPO and national office communications for potential case studies or data relevant to sports-related filings.", "What to monitor: Engagement trends and specific narratives promoted under the #WorldIPDay hashtag to gauge policy emphasis."]
core_points_en: World IP Day 2026 focuses on the intersection of intellectual property rights and the sports industry.
The campaign highlights IP's role in protecting sports technology, design innovations, and broadcasting brands.
The EPO collaborates with national offices on a social media campaign using the #WorldIPDay hashtag.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Sports tech and apparel companies should leverage the heightened visibility to highlight their IP-driven innovations.
Practice note: Monitor EPO and national office communications for potential case studies or data relevant to sports-related filings.
What to monitor: Engagement trends and specific narratives promoted under the #WorldIPDay hashtag to gauge policy emphasis.

items.title: Forum européen de la propriété intellectuelle (FEPI) 2026
items.title_zh: 2026 年欧洲知识产权论坛：全球反假冒斗争的核心
items.title_en: 2026 European IP Forum: Geopolitics and Technology Reshape Anti-Counterfeiting Strategies
items.summary: Forum européen de la propriété intellectuelle (FEPI) 2026 sgurtler@inpi.fr 30 mars 2026 Le FEPI au cœur de la lutte mondiale anti-contrefaçon Organisé par l’Unifab autour du thème « Géopolitique, législations, technologies… et même vocabulaire ! Quelles nouvelles influences sur la propriété intellectuelle ? », le forum, devenu au fil des ans incontournable et reconnu à l’échelle internationale, a une nouvelle fois réuni des intervenants de renom devant un parterre de dirigeants de PME et de prof
items.ai_summary_zh: 由 Unifab 组织的 2026 年欧洲知识产权论坛在巴黎举行，聚焦地缘政治、立法及技术对知识产权的新影响。法国工业产权局（INPI）作为历史合作伙伴参会，总局长 Pascal Faure 强调需协助企业将无形资产保护纳入发展战略，以培育欧洲冠军企业，并探讨了优化知识产权获取路径的潜在改革方向。
items.ai_summary_en: Organized by UNIFAB, the 2026 European Intellectual Property Forum (FEPI) convened in Paris to address how geopolitical shifts, legislative changes, and technological advancements influence intellectual property protection. The event featured seven panel discussions focusing on global anti-counterfeiting efforts and cross-border innovation practices. Pascal Faure, Director General of the French National Institute of Industrial Property (INPI), emphasized the critical need for companies to integrate intangible asset protection into their core development strategies. He highlighted INPI's ongoing commitment to supporting businesses and exploring reforms to facilitate easier access to IP systems, reinforcing the institute's role in fostering European champions through robust IP valorization.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，法国后续是否会围绕这类规则动态给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: For rights holders and in-house counsel, this forum underscores the increasing intersection of macro-political trends with operational IP enforcement. The emphasis on integrating IP into broader business strategy suggests a shift towards viewing IP not merely as a legal shield but as a central component of corporate valuation and market expansion. Stakeholders should note the institutional focus on facilitating access to IP mechanisms, which may signal upcoming administrative or procedural adjustments in France and potentially across the EU.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["论坛汇聚全球专家研讨地缘政治与科技对打假的影响", "INPI 重申支持企业将 IP 保护融入核心发展战略", "多方探讨通过立法与技术手段强化创新保护实践"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["The forum addressed the impact of geopolitics and new technologies on global anti-counterfeiting efforts and IP legislation.", "INPI Director General Pascal Faure urged firms to embed IP protection into strategic development plans to support growth.", "Discussions explored potential reforms to improve access to IP systems and strengthen international cooperation against infringement."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["紧跟欧洲反假冒政策演变，优化出口合规策略", "借力官方合作渠道，提升海外 IP 资产保护能级"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Align IP portfolio management with broader corporate development strategies to enhance asset valorization and competitive positioning.", "Practice note: Monitor INPI initiatives regarding simplified access to IP protections, as these may reduce administrative burdens for applicants.", "What to monitor: Evolving definitions and legislative responses to technology-driven IP infringements discussed at major industry forums like FEPI."]
core_points_en: The forum addressed the impact of geopolitics and new technologies on global anti-counterfeiting efforts and IP legislation.
INPI Director General Pascal Faure urged firms to embed IP protection into strategic development plans to support growth.
Discussions explored potential reforms to improve access to IP systems and strengthen international cooperation against infringement.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Align IP portfolio management with broader corporate development strategies to enhance asset valorization and competitive positioning.
Practice note: Monitor INPI initiatives regarding simplified access to IP protections, as these may reduce administrative burdens for applicants.
What to monitor: Evolving definitions and legislative responses to technology-driven IP infringements discussed at major industry forums like FEPI.

items.title: GO Entrepreneurs Paris 2026
items.title_zh: INPI 将参展 2026 巴黎创业者大会并提供设计保护咨询
items.title_en: INPI to Attend Go Entrepreneurs Paris 2026 with IP Diagnostic and Brand Protection Sessions
items.summary: GO Entrepreneurs Paris 2026 sgurtler@inpi.fr 18 mars 2026 Les 15 et 16 avril, Paris La Défense Arena accueille la 33ᵉ édition de Go Entrepreneurs, l’événement incontournable des créateurs et dirigeants d’entreprises. Partenaire engagé des entrepreneurs à chaque étape de leur parcours, l’INPI sera une nouvelle fois au rendez-vous. Vous avez des questions sur le dépôt de votre marque ou la protection de vos innovations et de votre design ? Vous souhaitez des renseignements sur les formalités d’ent
items.ai_summary_zh: 法国国家工业产权局（INPI）确认参加 2026 年 4 月在巴黎拉德芳斯竞技场举办的第 33 届“创业者大会”。作为企业合作伙伴，INPI 将在 B51 展位提供关于商标申请、创新及外观设计保护的免费咨询，并举办专题研讨会，指导企业如何进行工业产权诊断、品牌保护及网站命名策略，以协助初创企业完善知识产权布局。
items.ai_summary_en: The French National Institute of Industrial Property (INPI) will participate in the 33rd edition of Go Entrepreneurs, held on April 15–16, 2026, at Paris La Défense Arena. As a committed partner for entrepreneurs, INPI experts will be available at stand B51 to provide free individual consultations regarding trademark filing, innovation protection, and industrial property diagnostics. The institute will also host specific workshops and roundtables focusing on brand protection strategies, website naming conventions, and the strategic role of intellectual property in business development.
items.ai_insight_zh: 赴法或进入欧盟市场的中国企业应利用此类官方活动获取一手注册指南。建议提前准备知识产权诊断需求，重点关注外观设计与品牌命名的本地化合规，避免因权利瑕疵阻碍市场拓展，善用官方免费资源降低维权成本。
items.ai_insight_en: For rights holders and applicants targeting the French market, this event offers direct access to official guidance on local registration formalities and brand strategy. Engaging with INPI representatives can clarify procedural requirements for trademarks and designs early in the project lifecycle. Participants should note the specific focus on aligning brand names with digital presence, which is increasingly relevant for comprehensive IP portfolio management in Europe.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["INPI 将在巴黎创业者大会设立展位提供一对一免费诊断服务", "举办专题研讨会，讲解品牌保护策略与网站命名合规要点", "重点涵盖外观设计、商标等工业产权的注册流程与保护机制"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["INPI experts will offer free one-on-one industrial property diagnostics at stand B51 to help secure projects through IP protection and monitoring.", "A demo workshop titled '30 minutes to protect your brand and choose your site name' is scheduled for April 15, featuring INPI and AFNIC experts.", "Roundtable discussions will address the critical role of industrial property in enterprise development, including company and trade name considerations."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["利用 INPI 官方活动获取外观设计注册的本地化实操指导", "重视品牌命名与网站域名的协同保护，规避早期法律风险"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Direct engagement with INPI officials provides clarity on French trademark and design registration procedures for market entrants.", "Practice note: Utilize the free diagnostic sessions to identify potential gaps in industrial property protection before finalizing brand assets.", "What to monitor: Emerging best practices for coordinating corporate naming strategies with domain name registration as discussed by INPI and AFNIC."]
core_points_en: INPI experts will offer free one-on-one industrial property diagnostics at stand B51 to help secure projects through IP protection and monitoring.
A demo workshop titled '30 minutes to protect your brand and choose your site name' is scheduled for April 15, featuring INPI and AFNIC experts.
Roundtable discussions will address the critical role of industrial property in enterprise development, including company and trade name considerations.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Direct engagement with INPI officials provides clarity on French trademark and design registration procedures for market entrants.
Practice note: Utilize the free diagnostic sessions to identify potential gaps in industrial property protection before finalizing brand assets.
What to monitor: Emerging best practices for coordinating corporate naming strategies with domain name registration as discussed by INPI and AFNIC.
